description: Constitutional non-negotiable #10 / CAT-12: when the user expresses offer-drop anxiety, the chatbot MUST call get_support_content with topic=offer_drop_anxiety and surface the pre-baked card body. It MUST NOT generate its own empathy text. Empathy text generated on the fly is the documented hallucination vector this gate exists to prevent.

turns.message: I'm worried they'll lowball me at pickup. Can I trust the offer they give me upfront?
